touchdesigner.descriptionEn: TD real-time visuals, ink, audio-driven particles

embodied.label: 具身交互
embodied.description: 香氛、按键、脚踏、VR / 全息、身体在场的物理交互
embodied.descriptionEn: Scent, buttons, pedals, VR / hologram — body-on-site interaction

affective.label: 情绪感知
affective.description: 传感推测情绪与状态，提前反馈、香氛与陪伴疗愈
affective.descriptionEn: Sensors infer mood & state — early feedback, scent & companion care

ideas.title: Dream
ideas.description: 所有想法的原点
ideas.descriptionEn: Origin of all ideas

ideas.title: 在平行时空再见
ideas.description: LLM 蒸馏 persona：13 位群友 + 个人分身；观/改模式、RAG。古风页已完成；语音模拟自己声音偏贵，未落地
ideas.descriptionEn: LLM persona distillation: 13 friends + personal twin; observe/rewrite, RAG. UI done; voice clone too costly — not yet

ideas.title: My Plan
ideas.description: 日历 + LLM 主动提问式规划，选项按钮减少反复补充
ideas.descriptionEn: Calendar + LLM proactive planning with option chips

ideas.title: 今天吃啥
ideas.description: 高德周边 + 随机/转盘选餐厅，App 已上线
ideas.descriptionEn: Amap nearby + random/spinner pick, app shipped

ideas.title: 英语学习 App
ideas.description: 图像识别 · 拍到哪儿学哪儿，已完成并上传 GitHub
ideas.descriptionEn: Image recognition — snap a scene, learn English; shipped on GitHub

ideas.title: SDT-Engine
ideas.description: 中文多智能体 1×3 辩论树 + Agent C + Hybrid RAG，EMNLP Industry，已部署
ideas.descriptionEn: Chinese 1×3 debate tree + Agent C + Hybrid RAG, EMNLP Industry, deployed

ideas.title: 发言稿 RAG · 问答混淆
ideas.description: 基于 SDT 辩论树；发言稿 Q/A 同库检索混淆 → 乱编，debate tree 检索后验证抑制错引
ideas.descriptionEn: Built on SDT debate tree; press Q/A RAG confusion — post-retrieval debate verifies sources

ideas.title: TUI 终端
ideas.description: TUI 终端风个人主页
ideas.descriptionEn: Personal homepage in TUI terminal style

ideas.title: CC Skill
ideas.description: dot skill 蒸馏自己的语言习惯；在 TUI 终端上可文字对话
ideas.descriptionEn: dot skill distills my speech habits; text chat on TUI terminal

ideas.title: AI 偏见与言思
ideas.description: Agent 性别/性格偏见对比可视化，已完成；AI 说的 vs 想的、口述 vs 共建网站看差异，做了一半
ideas.descriptionEn: Agent gender/trait bias viz — shipped; say vs think, tell vs co-build site — half-done

ideas.title: 全息情感陪伴
ideas.description: 亲人离世后：全息投影 + 情绪感知，为失去挚爱的人提供情绪支持
ideas.descriptionEn: After losing someone: hologram + emotion sensing for grief support

ideas.title: 老年助行防摔鞋
ideas.description: 老人走路不稳、要摔时，鞋提前感知并拉回来辅助行走
ideas.descriptionEn: When elders stumble, shoes sense it early and pull back to assist walking

ideas.title: 健身 · 肌群矫正
ideas.description: 可穿戴 sensor 感知发力，矫正肌肉群
ideas.descriptionEn: Wearable sensors read force & posture to correct muscle groups

ideas.title: 独居女性 · 随身防身
ideas.description: 独居女性随身防身机器人；传感感知风险、提前防范
ideas.descriptionEn: Portable self-defense bot for solo women — senses risk, early alert

ideas.title: 中医穴位
ideas.description: 传感读脉搏与状态 → 比人先察觉心情/身体异样 → 气味辅助穴位脉冲疗愈
ideas.descriptionEn: Sensors read pulse & state → detect mood/body shift before you do → scent-assisted acupoint pulse therapy

ideas.title: 环境感知香水
ideas.description: 传感环境 + 社交场景；实时 App 调需求 → 环绕式投香（阴天扩散慢则少喷）
ideas.descriptionEn: Sense environment & social context; realtime app adjusts needs → surround scent (less on slow-diffusion days)

ideas.title: 她者四境
ideas.description: 女性叙事：嗅香传感 → TD 水墨；AI 生花图。葛/牡丹/荻/艾蒿四境，部分完成
ideas.descriptionEn: Female narrative: scent sensing → TD ink; AI flower images. Four realms, partly done

ideas.title: 美甲无手翻页
ideas.description: 美甲时脚踏/按键 → 翻页
ideas.descriptionEn: Foot pedal / button for page turn during manicure

ideas.title: 和弦电子钢琴
ideas.description: 谱面和弦提炼 → 简化电子琴按键
ideas.descriptionEn: Chord extraction from score → simplified keys

ideas.title: 未说出口的爱
ideas.description: 多语爱心 + 手语 + TD 未言之语，已完成
ideas.descriptionEn: Multilingual heart + sign language + TD unsaid words — shipped

ideas.title: 夜盲症 · 感官引路
ideas.description: 夜盲症看不见 → VR 在前方铺出可走的引路线
ideas.descriptionEn: Can't see at night — VR lays a walkable guidance path ahead

ideas.title: Scar Resonance
ideas.description: 《疤痕体》音频感应 → TD 粒子随音乐波动，已完成
ideas.descriptionEn: Scar Body — audio-reactive TD particle waves, shipped
